structural_claim: Hierarchical structure formation through gravitational/collective instabilities creates multi-scale systems where small-scale fluctuations seed large-scale organization

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Dark matter halos form hierarchically through gravitational collapse of density peaks, with structure emerging from small-scale fluctuations
Gravitational instability naturally creates hierarchical topology where matter flows along filaments into nodes
Plasma turbulence operates on multiple separated timescales with small-scale fluctuations driving large-scale transport
Microinstabilities dominate transport, showing how small-scale collective effects determine large-scale behavior
